department: Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE)

units.title: Signals, Systems and Digital Signal Processing
units.description: Continuous and discrete-time signals, Fourier transforms, Laplace transforms, filter design, sampling theory, and digital signal processing algorithms.

units.title: Embedded Systems and IoT
units.description: Microcontroller programming, real-time operating systems, hardware-software co-design, sensor interfacing, and IoT architectures and protocols.

units.title: Machine Learning for Electrical Engineers
units.description: Statistical learning theory, regression, classification, neural networks, and deep learning applications in signal processing, control systems, and power systems.

units.title: AI and Generative Models in Power Systems
units.description: Application of large language models, transformer architectures, and generative AI to power system monitoring, fault detection, grid optimization, and automated reporting.

units.title: Cyber-Physical Systems Security
units.description: Security of industrial control systems, SCADA security, firmware vulnerability analysis, hardware security, and supply chain risks in embedded systems.

units.title: Cloud Computing for Engineering Applications
units.description: Cloud platforms for engineering workloads, distributed computing, serverless data pipelines, and infrastructure for large-scale simulation and data analysis.

units.title: Wireless Communications and 5G/6G
units.description: Modulation techniques, channel coding, OFDM, MIMO, 5G NR architecture, network slicing, and emerging 6G technologies.

units.title: VLSI Design and Hardware Acceleration
units.description: CMOS circuit design, digital VLSI, hardware description languages, FPGA design, custom AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.
